pi_items.source: Confirmed via Python ephem computing 99.3% phase Full Moon on May 22 20:00 UTC and checking standard real-world Mount Everest coordinates

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real-world ephemeris and geographic data for Mount Everest (27.9881° N, 86.9250° E, altitude 8848m) targeting the May 22 20:00 UTC 2024 full moon. Expected outputs at /home/ga/Desktop/summit_briefing.txt and /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium are rigorously confirmed via the export scripts. A mathematical contradiction was identified: the claimed 'expected_lon_rad' of 1.51714 is incorrect, as 86.9250 degrees accurately converts to 1.51713 radians.
